item.title: Ecuador bans oil drilling to protect 700,000-hectares of rainforest
item.description: The Inter-American Court of Human Rights ordered the Ecuadorian government to protect Indigenous groups from oil operations and to leave oil in the ground underneath their lands. #ActOnClimate #climate #energy #IndigenousPeoples
item.dc:creator: nahomcam

item.title: This sounds weird, but hear me out.....
item.description: So I'm 45 and found out March 14 my husband of 12 years has been cheating on me for the last 5 years. I don't want advice. I don't need pity. I need some kick ass ladies to drink wine with on my full week of solo vacation. I probably shouldn't be completely alone for the entire week. I will be near Winston Salem June 6-9 and might be down to relax at an outdoor bar and just chit chat with people. If you know the area let me know where good places to people watch are, and places to avoid. Guys, no thanks. I'm not down for revenge. I am focusing on myself, and not needing to go through STD checks again. Update: https://imgur.com/a/CZJzKSV
item.dc:creator: Teachur

Gimme that spagghet
The last thing they expected was for us to take it seriously since they only pretended to.
Consider...
Guess the meaning of my life amounts to a cocktail of medications.
Lawlessness...
This one's easy.
The Beez for Oblation.
item.dc:creator: SuicidalThots666

item.title: Libby Audiobook and Ebook Cheat Code
item.description: Unlock a Treasure Chest of Audiobooks and eBooks… with Libby (and a little strategy) If you’re not using the Libby app yet, you’re missing out on one of the best-kept secrets for audiobook and eBook lovers. It connects you to your library’s digital collection — for free — and works like magic on your phone, Kindle, or tablet. But here’s something a lot of people don’t realize (I just researched this for myself): You aren’t limited to just your local library. Many libraries across the country offer memberships to non-residents — sometimes free, sometimes for a small fee — and they can unlock MASSIVE audiobook and Kindle book collections through Libby. For example: • I just picked up a Queens Public Library card for $50/year. (Their audiobook and Kindle eBook collection is huge — way bigger than my local options!) • Other top libraries like Houston Public Library, Fairfax County Public Library, and Charlotte Mecklenburg Library also offer non-resident cards if you want even more options. • You can add multiple libraries to your Libby app and search across all of them at once for the books you want. Bottom line: If you love audiobooks, eBooks, or you just want way more choices without constantly buying new stuff — look into getting extra library cards. A little bit of strategy can save you a ton of money and give you access to an endless stream of amazing content. Happy reading and listening! #Libby #Libraries #Audiobooks #Ebooks #PersonalDevelopment
item.dc:creator: gambrill

item.title: The Hoh Rainforest in the Olympic National Park is Unreal
item.description:
A full half day's drive from Seattle, and located in the shadow of Mt Olympus
The rainforest feels entirely primordial, with year round moss covering damn near everything
Trees that feel like sentient guardians
And look like a Studio Ghibli landscape
Right down to the fauna
Beautiful in fall
And winter
Never dry, particularly, in any season
Few signs of human interference in the park
And those signs are often reclaimed by the surrounding nature
A strikingly beautiful place
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: What Happened Today #87
item.description: ? America is being divided in two. The split isn’t coming. It’s already here. Inside the gates, loyalty buys you protection, wealth buys you access, and history is rewritten by decree. Trump’s inner circle is building a private empire where $500,000 gets you a key to power, human rights offices are shuttered, Indigenous people are erased from public memory, and protest is framed as betrayal. Outside the gates, Americans fight just to keep their health care, their citizenship, and their right to speak. Jeffries and Booker spent 12 hours on the Capitol steps because survival in this system is not guaranteed, and silence would mean surrender. There’s no more pretending this isn’t deliberate. It’s by design. And the walls are rising fast. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email in the sidebar. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/columbus-day 2. https://go.govbrief.today/greenland-respect 3. https://go.govbrief.today/colsprings-nightclub 4. https://go.govbrief.today/homan-not-deported 5. https://go.govbrief.today/60-minutes-pelley 6. https://go.govbrief.today/putin-stop-shooting 7. https://go.govbrief.today/800-houthi-targets 8. https://go.govbrief.today/university-collective 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-town-hall 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tariffs-taxes 11. https://go.govbrief.today/state-dept-cuts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/executive-branch-club 13. https://go.govbrief.today/capitol-sitin Hey, Imgur, family in town, back for comments late Monday.
